title: Lifesteal
description: Kill players, earn hearts. Die, lose hearts.
body:
Lifesteal is a Minecraft mod inspired by the popular Lifesteal server. This mod allows you to customize the way that hearts work.

## **Features**
- The maximum number of hearts a player can have
- The minimum number of hearts a player can have
- How many hearts a player gains from a kill
- How many hearts a player loses from dying
- If you allow player hearts to regen
- How many hearts a player can regen
- How long it takes to regen a heart
- If you can withdraw hearts

## **More Info**
All listed settings are modifiable using either mod menu or running the commands on the server or with admin permissions.

## **Configurable Options**
- Min/Max hearts
- Hearts lost/gained on death/kill
- Enable/Disable heart regeneration
- Time to regen a heart
- Enable/Disable heart withdrawal

## **Misc**
Use the command `/lifesteal help` to list all the commands

> You can use this however you would like in any packs, and feel free to send any reports or requests for features :)
